description_long: This is a medium-sized, freestanding cabinet with a light wood grain finish and a minimalist design. The front features two large, flat doors with a smooth, matte surface in a pale gray or off-white color, framed by the natural wood texture. The rear side reveals three drawers at the top and two cabinet doors below, each with small, round black knobs for opening. The sides and top are finished in the same light wood grain, giving the piece a cohesive and modern appearance. The cabinet stands on small, barely visible feet, elevating it slightly off the ground. Its clean lines and neutral tones make it suitable for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, garages, or apartment entryways.
description: A modern, light wood grain cabinet with smooth gray doors and black knobs, featuring both drawers and cabinet compartments. Its minimalist design and neutral colors suit urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view shows two large, flat, pale gray doors framed by light wood, with no visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view displays the continuous light wood grain texture and the cabinet's rectangular profile.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals three drawers with black knobs above two cabinet doors, also with black knobs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the uninterrupted wood grain surface.
